name: Cherry Clafouti
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Spray four 4 oz. ramekins or custard cups with vegetable cooking spray. Divide cherries among prepared ramekins; sprinkle 1 teaspoon kirsch over each.
In a medium-sized bowl, combine flour and fructose. Stir in evaporated skim milk, egg, and vanilla; whisk until well blended. Divide the mixture evenly on top of cherries in ramekins.
Place ramekins in a baking dish; add enough hot tap water to reach halfway up sides. Bake for 30 minutes or until edges are set but centers are still soft. Serve warm, lightly dusted with confectioner's sugar.
